overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a foggy industrial harbor district during golden hour. The character navigates wooden docks and train tracks past warehouses with smoking chimneys, eventually reaching a waterfront with moored sailboats before returning through narrow passages between green wooden buildings.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along wooden platform next to train tracks with industrial buildings on the left

entered.detail: tall factory chimneys emitting dark smoke against the hazy sky
metal railway tracks running parallel to the wooden walkway
weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway
dark brick factory building with multiple windows
wooden telegraph poles with crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a hazy industrial rail yard during golden hour. The camera follows the character walking along a wooden platform beside train tracks, with tall smokestacks visible in the distance and industrial brick buildings lining the left side.

events.description: approaching large warehouse building with 'WAREHOUSE' painted on the facade

agents.ego_description: walking toward the warehouse entrance while passing workers standing near the building

notable_agents.action: worker standing with hands on hips near the warehouse entrance

entered.detail: massive industrial warehouse with 'WAREHOUSE' painted in large white letters on the side
stacked wooden barrels and crates near the warehouse entrance
small wooden shed structure next to the main warehouse

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a large industrial warehouse with painted signage, passing workers standing near the entrance. Wooden barrels and a small office shed are visible as the smokestacks recede into the background.

events.description: entering narrow alley between wooden freight buildings toward the waterfront

agents.ego_description: navigating through tight passage between industrial buildings toward the water

notable_agents.action: worker walking ahead in the distance toward the waterfront

entered.detail: two-story wooden freight building with 'LEMoyne Freight & Storage' signage
stacked wooden shipping crates and cargo boxes

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow passage between wooden freight buildings, passing the Lemoyne Freight & Storage building. Stacked crates line the path as the character approaches the waterfront opening ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy waterfront dock with moored sailboats

events.description: emerging from industrial buildings onto open waterfront with sailboats moored in fog
turning around to head back toward the warehouse district

agents.ego_description: walking along the dock looking at the moored boats in the foggy water before turning back

entered.detail: multiple sailboats with tall masts floating in the foggy harbor water
wooden posts lining the edge of the dock
long green wooden warehouse building along the dock edge
large cargo cranes visible through the fog in the distance
still harbor water reflecting the golden sunlight and fog

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a wide-open waterfront dock where sailboats are moored in the foggy water. The sun creates a golden glow through the mist as the character walks along the dock, passes a seated figure, and then turns to head back toward the industrial area.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial dock walkway with green warehouses

events.description: returning to enclosed warehouse area with green wooden buildings and resting workers

agents.ego_description: walking past green warehouse buildings where workers are resting against the walls

notable_agents.action: worker sitting against the green warehouse wall with arms crossed

entered.detail: green painted wooden warehouse with large barn-style doors
tall wooden plank fence running along the right side

segments.scene_description: The character turns back from the waterfront and walks along a narrow dock passage lined with green wooden warehouses. Workers sit resting against the building walls as the industrial smokestacks become visible again in the distance, completing the loop through the harbor district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a hazy industrial rail yard that gradually narrows into a dense corridor of freight warehouses. It begins with the character walking along a wooden platform beside train tracks, where tall smokestacks loom in the distance under the golden hour light. As the character advances, the scene shifts toward a large industrial warehouse with painted signage, passing by workers and wooden barrels while the distant smokestacks recede. The camera then follows the character into a narrow passage between wooden freight buildings, moving past the Lemoyne Freight & Storage facility and stacked crates before finally opening up toward the waterfront ahead.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a luminous, open waterfront back into the confined corridors of an industrial harbor. It begins on a wide-open dock where sailboats are moored in foggy water, with the sun casting a golden glow through the mist as the character passes a seated figure. As the character turns away from the water, the expansive view narrows into a tight passage lined with green wooden warehouses. The scene then shifts from the airy waterfront to a more crowded industrial atmosphere, passing workers resting against the walls. Finally, the camera tracks the character deeper into the district as the distant smoking chimneys reappear, completing the loop through the harbor.
